name: June's Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
Yield: 30 To 40 Biscotti, Depending On Thickness
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, and baking powder.
2. Cut in the butter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Gradually add the beaten eggs, mixing well after each addition.
4. Add the broken hazelnuts; mix until combined.
5. Grease a cookie sheet with butter.
6. Shape the batter into two rectangular forms on the prepared cookie sheet, about 1/2-inch thick.
7. Brush the tops of both rectangles with the remaining beaten egg.
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for about 45 minutes or until the tops are golden brown.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on wire racks.
10. Cut cooled biscuits into 3/4-inch slices.
11. Place the biscotti slice-side down back onto the cookie sheet.
12. Lower the oven temperature to 325°F (165°C).
13. Return the cookie sheet to the oven for about 10 minutes, or until lightly toasted on one side; watch carefully not to burn them.
14. Flip each piece and toast for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until lightly browned on both sides.
